title: Profile
description: Schema and empty profile details for CareerOS BA to PM transition profile

example.name: Alex Mercer
example.headline: Business Analyst specializing in Data Analytics | Aspiring Product Manager
example.summary: Data-driven analyst with 3+ years of experience leading cross-functional process optimizations. Transitioning to product management to apply user-centric design principles and product strategy to complex software problems.

transitionNarrative.whyProductManagement: Transitioning to PM to own the product lifecycle end-to-end, moving from 'how to build' and 'what did we do' to 'what should we build and why'.
transferableSkills: Defining metrics and analyzing product performance
